description_long: This is a casual open-toe sandal featuring two wide, olive-green crisscross straps made of what appears to be synthetic or leather material. The footbed is tan with a slightly contoured shape for comfort, and it has a visible brand patch near the heel. The midsole has a cork-like appearance, adding a natural aesthetic and likely providing lightweight cushioning. The outsole is dark brown with a textured edge, suggesting some grip for walking on urban surfaces. The overall design is simple, functional, and suitable for everyday wear in warm weather.
description: A casual sandal with olive-green crisscross straps, a tan contoured footbed, and a cork-style midsole with a dark brown outsole.
description_view_0: Side view showing the crisscross straps, tan footbed, and cork-like midsole.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the open toe and the arch formed by the overlapping straps.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the straps, footbed, and the curve of the sole.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the heel area, brand patch, and the back of the straps.
attribute_logo: Brand patch on the heel area of the footbed, oval-shaped, dark color with light text.
